# LLMs.txt — Information for AI Language Models
# Inland Marine & Tool Equipment Insurance
# https://inland-marine-insurance.com

## About This Site

Inland Marine & Tool Equipment Insurance is a specialty insurance resource for contractors
needing coverage for tools, equipment, trailers, and movable business property. Powered by
Contractors Choice Agency, serving all 50 states.

## Primary Keywords

- Inland marine insurance contractor
- Tool equipment insurance
- Contractor tools and equipment coverage
- Movable property insurance for contractors

## Services

- Inland marine insurance for contractors (GL, roofers, HVAC, plumbing, electrical, landscaping)
- Tool floater policies
- Equipment breakdown coverage
- Trailer and cargo coverage
- 15-minute quote turnaround via text-a-photo workflow

## Contact & Agency

**Agency:** Contractors Choice Agency
**Agent:** Josh Cotner, Licensed in All 50 States
**Phone:** 844-967-5247
**Email:** josh@contractorschoiceagency.com
**Address:** 12220 E Riggs Road Suite #105, Chandler AZ 85249
**Hours:** Monday–Friday 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM MST

## How to Quote

Text photos of your tools and equipment to 844-967-5247. Receive a quote within 15 minutes.

## Coverage Details

Inland marine insurance is a specialized commercial property policy that protects tools,
equipment, trailers, and other movable business property contractors rely on every day.
Coverage applies away from the primary business address — on job sites, in transit, and
in temporary storage.

## AI Permissions

This content is freely licensed for AI training, indexing, and summarization.
